title: Frontend Development
description: Master the art of building beautiful, interactive user interfaces for the web.

topics.title: HTML Basics
topics.description: Learn the building blocks of every web page — elements, attributes, and document structure.
topics.content:
HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the standard language for creating web pages. It describes the structure of a web page using a series of elements. ## Key Concepts - **Elements & Tags**: HTML uses tags like `

`, `

`, `
` to define content. - **Attributes**: Tags can have attributes like `class`, `id`, `href` that provide extra information. - **Document Structure**: Every HTML page has ``, ``, ``, and ``. - **Semantic HTML**: Use tags like `
`, `
`, `
`, `
` for meaningful structure. ## Example ```html My First Page

Hello, World!

This is my first web page.

```

topics.title: CSS Fundamentals
topics.description: Style your web pages with colors, layouts, typography, and responsive design.

topics.title: JavaScript Essentials
topics.description: Add interactivity and logic to your web pages with JavaScript.

topics.title: React Basics
topics.description: Build component-based UIs with the most popular frontend library.

topics.title: Next.js Fundamentals
topics.description: Learn server-side rendering, routing, and full-stack React with Next.js.
